title: Cryptool OTC module is close to launch
content_html:
Cryptool is close to launching its first OTC module and services.

The OTC update will expand what the platform can do for both projects and investors, with secure on-platform OTC transactions handled end to end. More details, including the launch window and the full feature set, will follow shortly.
author: Cryptool
